behavior_summary: U8P_BEDNS::look: A fast/inspect handler that displays a short bark/description ('bed') when the player examines the bed.

U8P_BEDNS::use: Handles the player 'using' the bed to rest. It blocks resting if the avatar is in combat or if enemies are nearby, presents a menu of rest durations (string options '0'..'5'), and if a positive duration is chosen performs a sleep sequence that fades the screen, advances in-game time by (periods * 4) hours, triggers a spawned effect/callback, restores the avatar's HP and Mana (inferred from Strength and Intelligence), and restores pre-rest avatar stasis state.
notable_control_flow: U8P_BEDNS::look: single bark text followed by a suspend/terminate; no branching or external actions.
U8P_BEDNS::use: guard checks at start: Npc::isInCombat(avatar) and Npc::areEnemiesNear(avatar). If either is true, resting is prevented.

U8P_BEDNS::use: constructs a menu (local1) with options '0'..'5', presents it via Ask, captures selection into local2 via SuspendAssign, then strcmp(local2,'0') is used to detect 'do nothing' selection.

U8P_BEDNS::use: when chosen_periods > 0, code saves previous stasis (local4=getAvatarInStasis()), sets avatar stasis (setAvatarInStasis(1)), runs process FadeToBlack, advances time by (chosen_periods * 4) hours using TimeInGameHours + SetTimeInGameHours, spawns FREE::func1C19(0) or similar effect, restores HP/Mana (inferred via Npc::getStr/getInt -> Npc::setHp/setMana), runs process FadeFromBlack, and restores the saved stasis value with setAvatarInStasis(local4).
open_questions: Exact numeric formula used to restore HP and Mana — raw indicates Strength/Intelligence are involved (inferred as *2) but the code-level multiplier and whether it sets current or max values is uncertain.
Precise role and timing of the spawn ->FREE::func1C19 call: likely a housekeeping/timed callback during rest but its effect is unknown.
Whether '0' selection explicitly means 'wake immediately with no time passage' or serves as a cancel option in other UI contexts (menu semantics inferred from option label '0').
Any game-state side effects (status, conditions, buffs/debuffs) modified during rest beyond HP/Mana and time advancement are not visible in the disassembly and remain unknown.

main_function.name: U8P_BEDNS::look
main_function.purpose: Provide the short inspect description/bark for the bed when the player examines it.
entry_conditions: Triggered by the game's 'U8P_BEDNS::look' or examine interaction on the bed object (fast-area/inspect event).

function_map.name: U8P_BEDNS::look
function_map.role: inspect/bark handler (short description shown when examining the bed)

function_map.name: U8P_BEDNS::use
function_map.role: rest interaction handler: guard against combat/enemies, present rest-duration menu, advance time and restore avatar resources

external_calls.purpose: Check whether the avatar/NPC is currently in combat to block resting
Check for nearby enemies to block resting
Present the rest-duration menu (options '0'..'5') and capture the player's choice into a local variable
Read and save the avatar's current stasis state so it can be restored after rest
Set avatar stasis on before fade/sleep and restore previous stasis after waking
Visual fade-to-black transition before advancing time / during rest
Read current in-game hour to compute the new time after resting
Advance the game's in-game hours by the chosen rest duration (periods * 4)
Spawn an effect or schedule a callback during/after the rest sequence (exact purpose unclear)
Read avatar Strength to compute HP restoration amount
Set avatar HP when waking (inferred to U8P_BEDNS::use Strength-derived value)
Read avatar Intelligence to compute Mana restoration amount
Set avatar Mana when waking (inferred to U8P_BEDNS::use Intelligence-derived value)
Visual fade-in transition after rest / time advancement

quick_facts.behavior_summary_one_liner: U8P_BEDNS::look: A fast/inspect handler that displays a short bark/description ('bed') when the player examines the bed.
